name: Evt Limited
analysis: EVT has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$12.8900, stop A$11.6325, target A$14.2400 (1.07:1) — then trail it.
